You move 20% faster per level. Passive.
ability.player_abilities_dev.guardian_an: When a blow would kill you, survive it and recover to full health instead.
Taking damage sends adrenaline through your veins, granting Speed I for 10 seconds.
ability.player_abilities_dev.restful_med: Meditate in place to enter a restful trance, restoring health and hunger over time. Moving breaks the trance.
